name: daya-payment-tracker
description: Daya payment collection and webhook reconciliation app with AWS deployment options.

scripts.cdk:serverless:synth: npm run build && cdk synth --app "node dist/infra/serverless-app.js"
scripts.cdk:serverless:deploy: npm run build && cdk deploy --app "node dist/infra/serverless-app.js"
scripts.cdk:containers:synth: npm run build && cdk synth --app "node dist/infra/app.js"
scripts.cdk:containers:deploy: npm run build && cdk deploy --app "node dist/infra/app.js"
